title: Data | U.S. Department of Education
description: ED oversees the collection of data and statistics about education and educational policies designed to help policymakers and analysts as they make educational policy decisions.

summaryHistory.summary: ED oversees several data and statistic resources that collect and analyze data for use by the public, including parents, students, teachers, administrators, policy-makers, and researchers that can be used to change and improve educational programs and policies that impact students of all ages.
